_note: SYNTHETIC demo data — process-criticality register (1=low impact, 10=plant-stopping). In production this is owned by the reliability team / RCM study, not the AI.

CC2-MO-01.rationale: Mold oscillator on Caster 2 — single point of failure for the casting strand; failure mid-heat risks breakout (safety + multi-shift loss).

HSM-COILER-01.rationale: Downcoiler — hot strip mill cannot evacuate product without it; jam cascades upstream within minutes.

BF3-GCP-FAN-02.rationale: Gas cleaning plant ID fan, Blast Furnace 3 — redundancy exists (FAN-01) but at reduced furnace rate.

LF1-HYD-01.rationale: Ladle furnace main hydraulic power unit — loss stops ladle treatment; heats divert or freeze (sequence-breaking).
